prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen3.5 (CZPA, 2.0L TSI)** with upgraded turbocharger map targeting 380 HP and 480 Nm on 98 RON fuel, utilizing a **Garrett GT2867RS .82 A/R turbo** with billet compressor wheel and 3D-printed titanium wastegate actuator housing for reduced lag and optimized spool on the T-Roc R’s transverse-mounted platform

Full **034 Motorsport Motorsport Engine Mount Kit (P/N 034-10-0001)** with billet aluminum inserts and 80A polyurethane bushings to eliminate torque steer under aggressive launches, paired with a **Neuspeed P-Flo Carbon Fiber Driveshaft (P/N NSP-1012000)** to handle increased power delivery without harmonic distortion

Custom **Wagner Tuning Competition Intercooler (P/N 40000100)** with 100% aluminum core and 3.5" thick end tanks, designed specifically for the T-Roc R’s front bumper ducting, reducing intake temps by 22°C under sustained 2.5-bar boost, paired with a **Forge Motorsport Motorsport Dual-Ported BOV (P/N FMFSI0022)** to eliminate compressor surge during gear shifts
estetica: **Rieger Tuning RS-Style Widebody Kit (P/N 5000-0001)** with 30mm extended fenders in carbon fiber (2x2 twill weave) and integrated LED turn signals, designed to clear **BBS CI-R 9.5x19" ET40 wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect 245/35 R19** tires for aggressive stance without rubbing

**VMR Carbon Fiber Rear Diffuser (P/N VMR-701-CF)** with integrated titanium exhaust tips for the **Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium Exhaust (P/N S-VW01-TI01)** system, featuring a 70mm diameter and electronically controlled butterfly valve for backpressure optimization, paired with a **Seibon Carbon Fiber Hood (P/N VW-TROC-R-HOOD)** with functional NACA ducts for intercooler airflow

**OMP Carbon Fiber Racing Seats (P/N OMP7955)** with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, mounted on **Sparco Pro 2000 Slide-In Rails (P/N 00779-01)** for FIA-spec positioning, complemented by a **MOMO Mod.77 Steering Wheel (P/N 105.77.25B.30)** with Alcantara and red stitching, featuring a quick-release hub for the T-Roc R’s DSG paddle shifters
